title: Kureha Questions Hiriluk
description: On pages 5–9, this part focuses on kureha questions hiriluk, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Questions Hiriluk. Chopper learns what Hiriluk believes about medicine, hope, and the cherry blossom dream that can heal a country. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: So after a year of living with him,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You suddenly chased him away...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: It was the right thing to do! Just think how he would feel,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: If he watched the only friend he ever had in his entire life,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Die right before his eyes...!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Or would your rather have him sink even deeper into grief!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: We're cut from the same cloth... but... no... it's precisely because of that I want to teach him,

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: That anything is possible for even him...! I'll prove that by making the cherry blossoms bloom!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Listen carefully. You'll die four days from now at 5:30pm. That is your limit.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Although the germ that's infected you has no remedy,

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: With my medical skills, I can manage to trick your body into letting you live for 3 more weeks...!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: BUT! That's only if you had the cash to afford it, which I highly doubt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shut up and give me the damn treatment already!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You think you can kill a person with a mere tranquilizer?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: But whatever. I'll agree to treat you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let me see exactly what it is,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can offer to this country as a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Both of you really are cut from the same cloth...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Clumsy beyond help...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Get Lost! I don't care if you leave for the seas or wherever!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Just make sure you never show your face around here ever again!

summary: This part highlights kureha questions hiriluk and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
